step_rationale: Small dense LDL; highly atherogenic ApoB-lipoprotein variant.
mechanism: Small dense LDL particles are preferentially retained and oxidized in the arterial intima, driving early atherosclerotic lesion formation.

references.title: Association of lipoprotein subfractions with incidence of type 2 diabetes among five U.S. Race and Ethnic groups: The Mediators of Atherosclerosis in South Asians Living in America (MASALA) and Multi-Ethnic study of Atherosclerosis (MESA).
